relationship_moments.title: Flower meets wing
relationship_moments.detail: A monarch lands on a meadow bloom and stays for a slow sip. The plant gives nectar; the butterfly carries pollen on.

relationship_moments.title: Frog in the water
relationship_moments.detail: Still water holds a frog like a quiet bowl. The bullfrog belongs to the pond, and the pond shapes the frog.

relationship_moments.title: Hawk above the trees
relationship_moments.detail: The woodland's smaller birds notice the hawk first. They go quiet; the canopy waits. The hawk passes, and the singing returns.

relationship_moments.title: Fungi on the log
relationship_moments.detail: Mushrooms and worms work along an old log, turning wood back into soil. Slow work, quiet work, but always going.

relationship_moments.title: Edges of the city
relationship_moments.detail: Alleys, fences, and quiet corners make room for sparrows by day and a raccoon at night. City edges are habitat too.
